VMAorder 0.0.0.9000
  • Reference

Estimate Lagged Cross-Covariance Matrix

Source: R/covVMA.R
covVMA.Rd

Computes the lagged cross-covariance matrix for a multivariate time series.

Usage

covVMA(x, lag)

Arguments

x

Numeric matrix or data frame. Rows are time points and columns are variables.

lag

Non-negative integer lag.

Value

A p by p matrix containing the estimated lagged cross-covariances.

Details

For an n by p observation matrix \(X\), this function computes $$\widehat{\Gamma}(k) = \frac{1}{n}\sum_{t = 1}^{n-k} X_t X_{t+k}^{\top},$$ where \(k\) is the requested lag.

Examples

x <- matrix(rnorm(100 * 4), nrow = 100, ncol = 4)
covVMA(x, lag = 1)
#>             [,1]        [,2]        [,3]         [,4]
#> [1,] -0.09138032 -0.01620429 -0.02344429 -0.176566378
#> [2,]  0.09618746  0.13913531  0.18690322  0.027403475
#> [3,] -0.12914804  0.07676332 -0.18160144 -0.003903643
#> [4,] -0.08047578 -0.10856167 -0.06475181 -0.046627651
